title: Mildly Caramelized Italian Squid Ravioli
description: A tangy and light Italian dish featuring caramelized squid in dairy-free ravioli, perfect for a sick day. This dish is a unique twist on traditional ravioli, with a focus on seafood and caramelized flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped squid and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Caramelize the squid by cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Prepare the ravioli wrappers according to the package instructions.
Fill the ravioli wrappers with the caramelized squid mixture.
Serve the ravioli with tomato sauce and garnish with chopped parsley and lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
